name: pluxx
description: Scaffold, refine, and maintain Pluxx plugins from MCP servers inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Turn MCPs into maintainable plugins and refine them safely
interface.longDescription: Use Pluxx inside Codex to scaffold plugins from MCP servers, prepare agent context packs, refine skill taxonomy and instructions, and keep generated scaffolds synced over time.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluxx to scaffold a plugin from this MCP and test the core four.
Refine this Pluxx scaffold taxonomy with the agent pack and keep edits safe.
Sync this Pluxx MCP scaffold and tell me what changed.
